options.colorScheme.description.defaultMessage: Choose between light, dark, or system default.

options.connection.description.defaultMessage: Manage your Pi-hole instances and badge refresh settings.

options.connection.refreshInterval.descr.defaultMessage: Minimum 60s in Chrome (MV3 alarm constraint). Firefox allows lower values.

options.customization.badge.description.defaultMessage: What to display on the extension icon badge.

options.customization.description.defaultMessage: Adjust the appearance and behavior of the extension.

options.diagnostics.description.defaultMessage: Help improve the extension by sharing anonymous usage data.

options.language.description.defaultMessage: Choose the language for the extension interface.

options.piholeselector.description.defaultMessage: Configure one or more Pi-hole instances.

options.piholeselector.empty.defaultMessage: No Pi-holes configured. Add one to get started.

options.piholeselector.instance.apiPassw.defaultMessage: Leave empty if none is set

options.simpleOptions.refreshInterval.de.defaultMessage: Minimum 60s in Chrome (MV3 alarm constraint). Firefox allows lower values.

options.simpleOptions.showBadge.descript.defaultMessage: Display an ON / OFF badge on the extension icon reflecting the current blocking state.

options.telemetry.description.defaultMessage: Help improve the extension by anonymously sharing statistics like the extension version and platform. No Pi-hole data, activity, or personal information is ever collected.

options.telemetry.disabledTooltip.defaultMessage: Controlled by Firefox data collection settings
